Why Choose Us

Everything a Student Needs
to Succeed, Under One Roof

We do not just teach — we mentor, guide, and build the confidence that lasts a lifetime.

Expert Faculty

Seasoned educators with deep subject mastery who simplify complex concepts and make learning engaging and effective.

Small Batch Sizes

Focused attention for every student. Our small groups ensure no doubt goes unresolved and every student progresses at pace.

1-on-1 Private Tuition

Personalized learning plans crafted entirely around your child's strengths, weaknesses, and academic targets.

Regular Assessments

Weekly tests and detailed performance reports keep students on track and parents fully informed at every stage.

Scholarship Opportunities

Rewarding talent through our in-house Scholarship Examination for Grade 5 to Grade 10 with meaningful fee benefits.

Proven Track Record

500+ students have transformed their academic performance with Vidhyasagar Academy since our founding in 2020.

Personalized Learning
That Actually Works

Every student gets dedicated attention from faculty who genuinely care about results.

Concept-First Approach

We build rock-solid foundations before tackling exam patterns. Students understand, not just memorize.

Real-Time Progress Tracking

Parents receive detailed performance reports after every test, so you're always in the loop.

Excellence-Focused Culture

From Olympiads to board exams, we nurture a mindset of excellence and academic confidence.

Small, Focused Batches

No student gets left behind. Every doubt is addressed within the session itself.

FAQ

Frequently Asked
Questions

Have more questions? Call us or WhatsApp us — we are always happy to help.

Call 8108784766 WhatsApp Us
Do you provide offline classes?

Yes. Our physical centre is located at 202, 2nd Floor, Akshay Commercial Plaza, Chembur East, Mumbai. Classes run six days a week with morning and evening batch options.

What is the scholarship exam process?

Students from Grade 5 to Grade 10 appear for a 60-minute Olympiad-based exam in Maths or Science at our centre. Fee benefits are awarded based on performance — results are shared within a week.

Are private 1-on-1 tuition sessions available?

Yes. We offer personalized 1-on-1 tuition for any subject and grade at our centre. Sessions are scheduled as per the student's convenience with a fully customized learning plan and dedicated faculty.

What streams and subjects do you cover?

We cover Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Maths) and Commerce (Accounts, Economics, Business Studies, Maths). We also provide entrance prep for CET, NEET Foundation, and JEE Foundation.

What is the 12th Repeater Program?

A specially structured batch for students retaking their 12th board exams. It includes gap analysis, intensive revision, mock boards, and personal mentoring to maximize results and rebuild confidence.

How do batch sizes work?

We keep batches intentionally small so every student receives individual attention. Faculty can address every student's doubts within the session itself without anyone being left behind.

How do I enroll at Vidhyasagar Academy?

Fill the scholarship application form on this page, call us at 8108784766 / 9930187638, or walk into our Chembur East centre. We will schedule a free counseling session to understand your needs.

Is free academic counseling available?

Yes. We offer free academic counseling for students and parents to choose the right program. Our educators assess the student's current level and recommend the most suitable course and batch.
